reviews.comment:
Los sándwiches de miga de pan negro, secos, el jamón de muy mala calidad y una pasta indefinida de aderezo. El personal muy amable

(Translated by Google)
The sandwiches were made with dry, dark bread, the ham was very poor quality, and the dressing was an undefined paste. The staff was very friendly.
